questions.question: Identify the quantifier used in the statement: 'There exists a positive integer x such that 2^x > 10'. Which of the following is the correct completion of the statement?
questions.hint: For the correct completion, refer to the definition of 'there exists'

questions.question: Consider the set A = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5}. Which of the following statements are true?
questions.hint: You will need to apply the quantifier rules to each statement

questions.question: Complete the following statement: 'For all positive integers x, if x is even then x is divisible by 2'. Which of the following is the correct completion of the statement?
questions.hint: Refer to the definition of 'for all' and 'if-then' statements
